What are the safety features of the Honda CR-V?,"**Honda_CR_V Hybrid ﺷ Safety Features**

column3: Standard on all trims; integrates multiple driver_assist technologies.
Uses radar and camera to detect vehicles ahead and can apply up to 0.3_g of braking to reduce or avoid a collision.

column2: ۴ Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) with Low_Speed Follow
column3: Maintains a set distance from the vehicle ahead; can bring the CR_V to a complete stop and resume moving in traffic.
Provides gentle steering torque to keep the vehicle centered in its lane.
Alerts the driver and applies steering correction if the vehicle begins to drift out of its lane without a turn signal.
Detects road edges and, if the vehicle departs the roadway, provides steering and braking assistance to help return to the lane.
Camera reads speed_limit and other road signs, displaying them on the instrument cluster to keep the driver informed.
Uses radar sensors to warn of vehicles in the blind spot and of cross_traffic when reversing.
Audible and visual alerts when a potential frontal collision is detected.
Switches between high_ and low_beam as needed for optimal nighttime visibility.
Provides a wide_angle view of the area behind the vehicle, aiding parking and low_speed maneuvers.
Combines electronic stability control and traction control to help maintain vehicle stability on slippery surfaces.
Prevents rollback on inclines when moving from a stop.
Front, side, and curtain airbags protect occupants in frontal and side impacts.
Works with CMBS to pre_position the vehicle for optimal braking response.
Detects driver fatigue and issues alerts to encourage a break.
